use_cases: Project management dashboards for tracking task progress across team members
Sprint planning boards for development teams managing frontend, backend, and devops tasks
Workflow visualization for organizing and prioritizing work items
Team collaboration boards for sharing task assignments and status updates
Personal productivity tracking with drag-and-drop task reordering
ai_summary: A fully functional Kanban board component with drag-and-drop task management capabilities. Supports multiple columns with customizable colors, labeled tasks with assignees, and dynamic task creation. Built for project management interfaces, this component provides an intuitive Trello-like experience for organizing workflows across backlog, todo, in-progress, review, and done states.
